brandRules: Same lens family (35mm feel), wide static framing, soft realism grade, gently desaturated blacks, memory-like not documentary, one focal point, one atmosphere layer only, no HDR sharpness.

night_drive.title: Night Drive
night_drive.prompt: Cinematic photo of a lone driver perspective at night on a motorway, wet asphalt reflecting sodium streetlights, distant tunnel glow ahead, dashboard softly illuminating foreground in warm amber and dim red, light rain on windshield, shallow depth of field, film still aesthetic, realistic lighting, 35mm lens, slightly desaturated, emotional tone: reflective solitude, quiet motion forward. 16:9, no text, no watermark.

petrol_station_2am.title: Petrol Station 2am
petrol_station_2am.prompt: Empty petrol station at 2am, fluorescent canopy lights casting harsh white and green tones onto wet concrete, single parked car in distance, vending machine glow inside small shop, no people visible, slightly off-centre composition, cinematic realism, static wide shot, cold atmosphere, subtle film grain, emotional tone: liminal stillness. 16:9, no text, no watermark.

sunset_coast.prompt: Wide cinematic shot of a quiet coastline at sunset, golden sun low on horizon reflecting across calm sea, long soft shadows on empty beach, warm orange and peach sky blending into soft blue, minimal human presence, stable composition, film still, 50mm lens, emotional tone: emotional release and warmth. 16:9, no text, no watermark.

summer_afternoon_drift.prompt: Suburban street in late summer afternoon, warm sunlight slightly overexposed, soft wind moving curtains in open windows, empty quiet road, heat haze in distance, natural colours slightly faded, cinematic still frame, emotional tone: nostalgic calm and drifting time. 16:9, no text, no watermark.
